description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build stage containing two jobs. The first job, build:debian, uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/craigbarnes/dockerfiles/vala-debian, inherits a default before_script that runs `git fetch --tags` and sets `MAKEFLAGS="-j$(mk/nproc.sh)"`. It then executes `make USE_LOCAL_DISCOUNT=1`, `cat build/version.txt`, `du -h showdown`, `make install`, `apt-get update && apt-get -y install libmarkdown2-dev`, `make`, `ldd showdown | grep libmarkdown`, `du -h showdown`, and `make install`. The second job, pages, runs in the same build stage, uses the image registry.gitlab.com/craigbarnes/dockerfiles/flatpak, runs only on the master branch, and runs `echo "$GPG_PRIVATE_KEY" | gpg --import -`, `echo "$GPG_PUBLIC_KEY" > pubkey.asc`, `mkdir -p public/`, `flatpak-builder --gpg-sign=43705BA1 --repo=public/flatpak/ build/flatpak/ io.gitlab.craigbarnes.Showdown.json`, `flatpak build-update-repo --gpg-sign=43705BA1 public/flatpak/`, `cp res/showdown.svg showdown.flatpakref public/`, `flatpak -v remote-add --gpg-import=pubkey.asc showdown public/flatpak/`, `flatpak -y -v install showdown io.gitlab.craigbarnes.Showdown`, and `flatpak info io.gitlab.craigbarnes.Showdown`. The pages job publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
